name: Pickaxe Hit
description: a sharp stony crack of a pickaxe striking rock
usage: Mining rock / ore with the pickaxe.

ai.prompt: A pickaxe striking solid rock: a sharp, hard stone impact with a bright metallic ping and small gravel debris scatter. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
